channel.title: World
channel.description: The Washington Post World section provides information and analysis of breaking world news stories. In addition to our world news and video, Post World News offers discussions and blogs on major international news and economic issues.

item.title: Ukrainian drones hit Moscow and surrounding area, killing 3
item.dc:creator: Natalia Abbakumova
item.description: The attack, the largest and most deadly to target the Russian capital region since the invasion of Ukraine in 2022, showed Kyiv’s increasing ability to carry out long-range strikes.

item.title: Xi, in summit victory, projected stability and conceded nothing to Trump
item.dc:creator: Michelle Lee, Huiyee Chiew, Lyric Li
item.description: There were no big breakthroughs but also no blunders, and the summit positioned Xi Jinping as a leader at the height of his power seeking global stability.

item.title: Félicien Kabuga, Rwandan accused of financing genocide, has died
item.dc:creator: Sudarsan Raghavan
item.description: The ethnic Hutu tycoon was indicted on charges of genocide and crimes against humanity for allegedly arming Hutu militias that massacred more than 800,000 mostly ethnic Tutsis in 1994.
